member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.ITenantStorageProvider
member.summary: Abstraction for tenant-isolated file storage. All paths are automatically prefixed with the current tenant ID — tenant A can never access tenant B's files even in a shared bucket.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.ITenantStorageProvider.UploadAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a file. The path is automatically prefixed with the tenant ID.
member.returns: The full storage path including tenant prefix.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.ITenantStorageProvider.DownloadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a file by its logical path.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.ITenantStorageProvider.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a file by its logical path.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.ITenantStorageProvider.ListAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all files under the given prefix (within the current tenant's namespace).
member.param: Optional path prefix to filter results.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers.AzureBlobTenantStorageProvider
member.summary: Tenant-isolated Azure Blob Storage provider. Each tenant's files are stored under a tenant-{tenantId}/ blob path prefix within a shared container.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers.LocalTenantStorageProvider
member.summary: Tenant-isolated local disk storage provider. Stores files under {BasePath}/tenant-{tenantId}/{path}. Use for development, single-server deployments, or CI environments.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers.LocalTenantStorageProvider.#ctor(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.TenantStoragePathBuilder,System.String)
member.param: Root directory on disk. Defaults to ./tenant-storage.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers.S3TenantStorageProvider
member.summary: Tenant-isolated AWS S3 storage provider. All objects are stored with a tenant-{tenantId}/ key prefix, so tenant A can never access tenant B's objects even in a shared bucket.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers.S3TenantStorageProvider.#ctor(Amazon.S3.IAmazonS3,AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.TenantStoragePathBuilder,System.String)
member.param: The S3 bucket name to use.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageProvider
member.summary: Specifies which storage backend to use.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageProvider.Local
member.summary: Local disk. For development and single-server deployments.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageProvider.S3
member.summary: AWS S3.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageProvider.AzureBlob
member.summary: Azure Blob Storage.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for registering tenant storage providers.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageExtensions.WithLocalStorage(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a local disk for development.
member.param: Root directory for local storage. Defaults to ./tenant-storage.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageExtensions.WithS3Storage(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Registers the AWS S3 . Requires AWSSDK.S3 to be configured in your service container.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageExtensions.WithAzureBlobStorage(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the Azure Blob . Requires a BlobContainerClient to be registered separately.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageExtensions.WithTenantStorage(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.StorageProvider)
member.summary: Registers a storage provider by enum value. For S3/Azure, use the typed overloads for full configuration control.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.TenantStoragePathBuilder
member.summary:
Prepends the current tenant ID to all storage paths, ensuring complete isolation between tenants even in a shared storage backend.
Example: tenant "acme" + path "invoices/jan.pdf" → "tenant-acme/invoices/jan.pdf"

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.TenantStoragePathBuilder.Build(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the fully-qualified storage path for the current tenant.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.TenantStoragePathBuilder.StripPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Strips the tenant prefix from a full storage path, returning the logical path.
